titleStmt.title: SII 15.164: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 164. (B.K. No. 50 of 1928-29.) KANDGAL, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the compound of the Hanumān temple.
This is dated the 21st regnal year of the king, Vikrama, Jyēshṭha-amāvāsye, Sunday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1220 A.D., June 2. The weekday, however, was Tuesday.

It records that while Chakrapāṇi-Daṇḍanāyaka was administering Kandagāle in Karaḍikal Three Hundred, a gift of income from toll was made by the Five Hundred Svāmis of Ayyāvaḷe, together with the Prabhus, Mummuridaṇḍas, Ubhaya-Nānādēsis of Halasige Twelve Thousand and Banavāse Twelve Thousand who had assembled as Mahānāḍu at Kandagāle, the maḷigeyamane of Kannaḍa Four Thousand, to the god Pārśvanātha, whose temple was constructed by Nāgasiriyavve, the disciple of Sakaḷachandra-bhaṭṭāraka of Kāṇūra-gaṇa and Mūla-saṅgha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī matparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchyanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya sā
sanaṁ jinasāsanaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara
dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ yūdavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāśabhāskara māḷavīmalla nahita
rāyavurasella gūrjaravāraṇāṁkuśa teluṁgarāyaśirakamaḷōtpāṭana magadharāya
madanivāraṇa kaḷiṁgarāyakuḷavallarīkuṭhāra hoysaṇarāyabhayaṁkaraṁ yādavanā
rāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti siṁhaṇadēvarasaru dēvagiriya nelevīḍinoḷu sukasaṁkhathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamiralu . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bāhattara
niyōgādhipati sakaḷalakṣmīpati yanēkadēśādhipati yarirāyamaṁḍeḷikagarbbasūṟekā
ṟa rēkhārēvanta parabaḷakritāṁta svāmivaṁcakagajapaṁcānana śrīmatsiṁhaṇa dēvani
śiḷīmukha samaraśaṇmukha yaribhayadāyaka vibudhavaradāyaka gōtra pa
vitra maṁtrōcchāhaśaktitrayasaṁpaṁna yagaṁṇyapuṇyōdayaṁ bhayalō
bhadurllabhaṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaranumappa . vaṁkuvarāhutana besadiṁ . tatpādapadmō pajīvi mahāpa
sāyitaṁ sarbajanamanōraṁjana maṁtrimāṇikya nīticāṇakya vairībhakuṁbhasaṁbhēdane kaṁṭhīravanuṁ yāca
ka janasahi sanuṁ baṁdhujanakuvaḷayasudhākaranumappa cakrapāṇi daṁḍanā
yakaru karaḍikalla 300 ṟa baḷiya bāḍa kaṁdagāleyaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhi yiṁdāḷutta
miralu . jagamaṁ parbbida kīrtti kīrttigeṇeyādaudāryyauvaudāryyaśaktigeṇe kuṁntaḷalakṣmi lakṣmigeṇe
yādudoragaṁtudyōgamaṁ miguvaṁtāgi saṁbuddhi buddhiganukūlaṁ kū(ku)lada yvānukūlagu
negaḷdī sāsirbbaroḷu saṁtataṁ . svasti samastavastu vistīrnna ghornnitārnnava praṇatānūnabhu
vanavikhyāta sarbbaśatavīra sāsanalabdhānēkaguṇagaḷāṇa(gaṇāḷaṁ)kritaruṁ dayādākṣiṇya kṣamāśauryyavīryya
sujanajanamanō(ṁ)jaruṁ jinapūjāpurassareruṁ jinasamaya vārddhivarddhanacaṁdraruṁ
śrīmatpāruśvanāthacaraṇāraviṁdayugaḷabhriṁgāyamānaruṁ rāyarāsthānapūjyaruṁ saddharmma
pratiṣṭhāpakarumadharmmanivāraṇaruṁ jinagaṁdhōdakapavītrīkritōttamāṁgaruṁ samyak ratnāka
raruṁ duritakke dūraruṁ parasamayamada nivāraṇaruṁ banavasedesekāṟaruṁ nāgavaḷḷisa
mayasamuddharaṇaruṁ śrī bīralakṣmīnaṁdanavanābhīṣṭavasaṁtakaruṁ cōḷakuḷāṁtakaruṁ śaraṇāgatava
jrapaṁjararumappa śrīmadayyāvaḷeyaynūrvva svāmigaḷu mukhyavāgi kaṁnaḍa nālsā yirakke
pēṁṭhedāṇaṁ maḻigeya mane kaṁdagāleya sthaḷadalu śrī manmahāprabhu jakkarasana
maga sōmarasanuṁ nāgarasana maga brahmarasa sōvidēvanuṁ jannamarasana maga sōva rasanuṁ katti
ya brahmarasana maga dēvarasanuṁ mukhya samasta prabhugaḷuṁ sthaḷa samasta muṁmuridaṁḍaṁ gaḷuṁ hala
sige haṁnicchāsira banevasa haṁnicchāsira garamukhya samasta gātrigaruṁ yubheya nānādēsi
gaḷuṁ sāsirbbaruṁ mahānāḍāgi neradirddu svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpa cakravartti siṁ
haṇadēva vijayavarśada 21 neya vikrama saṁvatsarada jēṣṭa bahuḷa yamavāse yādivāra śūryya
grahaṇa saṁkrāṁti nimittavāgi yariśaḍvarggama nirmmūḻanamāḍe geluda tapa cakravartti kāṇūra gaṇa mūlasaṁ
gada sakaḷacaṁdrabhaṭṭārakara śisye samastaguṇasaṁpaṁneyappa nāgasiriyauvegaḷ māḍi sida sāsirvvara pārśvanā
dhadēvaraṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ riśiyarāhāradānakkaṁ paḍisaluvaṁtāgi sāsirbbaru
mēluvaṭṭeya Eleya hēṟiṁge vi 1 hēṟige ka . vūḷḷale 100 yintaravaṭṭada hēṟige ka . koṭṭaru pra
bhugaḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi naṁdavāḍeya holamērayiṁ teṁka basurigeṟeya hiriya basadi
ya keyiṁ mūḍalu 39 gēṇu bāciviḍiya ghaḷeyalu mattaru 6 koṭṭaru lōkē svaradēvara tōṭada baḍa
ga brahmadēvana tōṁṭadiṁ mūḍalu 260 kaṁba tōṁṭava koṭṭaru muṁmuridaṁḍaṁ gaḷu Aḍakeyarisina meṇasu mo
dalāgi sakaḷadhānyakkaṁ koṁḍalliyuṁ koṭṭalliyu kāṇi koṭṭaruThe continuation is worn out.
Digital edition of SII 15.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
